title: Inspect Hospital Station During Daily Preventive Maintenance
summary: Verify during daily preventive maintenance that each hospital station meets the documented inspection conditions: barcode scanner operational, stacklight operational, and tabletop free of debris.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when performing the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection for each hospital station.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to perform corrective repair or troubleshooting for scanner, stacklight, or tabletop issues; the source only provides inspection conditions and does not provide corrective steps.
Do not use this runbook to define how to test barcode scanner or stacklight operation beyond inspection; the source does not define the operational test method.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection of each hospital station and record whether the documented conditions are met.

safety_notes: This runbook is limited to inspection and documentation steps supported by the source.
If any inspection condition is not met, stop at documenting the observed issue; the source does not provide corrective actions.
access_or_tools_needed: Physical access to each hospital station
Ability to visually inspect the barcode scanner
Ability to visually inspect the stacklight
Ability to inspect the tabletop surface for debris
Daily preventive maintenance documentation or checklist

access_required: Physical access to each hospital station
system_preconditions: Hospital stations identified for daily preventive maintenance inspection are available to inspect.
external_references: Daily preventive maintenance documentation or checklist

visual_references.description: Hospital station operation image that can help identify the hospital station area and scanner context.
Hospital station stacklight photo for identifying the stacklight during inspection.
Hospital HMI screen context showing use of the green scanner at the hospital station.

steps.title: Go to each hospital station for inspection
steps.purpose: Position the inspector at each hospital station that must be checked during daily preventive maintenance.
steps.instruction: Go to each hospital station identified for daily preventive maintenance inspection.
steps.expected_result: Each required hospital station is reached and ready for inspection.
steps.healthy_condition: The hospital station is accessible for inspection.
steps.failure_condition: A required hospital station cannot be accessed or inspected.

actions.label: Access hospital station
actions.exact_action: Go to each hospital station identified for daily preventive maintenance inspection.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the hospital station image to identify the station area and scanner context before inspection.

stop_or_escalate_if: A required hospital station cannot be accessed for inspection.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The barcode scanner is operational. The stacklight is operational. The tabletop is free of debris.

steps.title: Inspect barcode scanner condition
steps.purpose: Verify the documented daily preventive maintenance condition for the hospital station barcode scanner.
steps.instruction: Inspect the hospital station barcode scanner and verify that it is operational.
steps.expected_result: The barcode scanner is verified as operational.
steps.failure_condition: The barcode scanner is not operational or its operational status cannot be confirmed from the inspection.

actions.label: Inspect barcode scanner
actions.exact_action: Inspect the hospital station barcode scanner and verify that it is operational.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the hospital station image for scanner location context.
Use the hospital HMI add tote screen context that references the green scanner used at the hospital station.

stop_or_escalate_if: The barcode scanner is not operational.
The source-supported inspection cannot confirm scanner operational status.
Corrective action is needed, because the source does not provide repair steps.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The barcode scanner is operational.
Artifact appears on page 92 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_5_9_hospital_station_operation.
The operator uses the green scanner to scan the tote barcode, which populates the Tote ID and Barcode fields.

steps.title: Inspect stacklight condition
steps.purpose: Verify the documented daily preventive maintenance condition for the hospital station stacklight.
steps.instruction: Inspect the hospital station stacklight and verify that it is operational.
steps.expected_result: The stacklight is verified as operational.
steps.failure_condition: The stacklight is not operational or its operational status cannot be confirmed from the inspection.

actions.label: Inspect stacklight
actions.exact_action: Inspect the hospital station stacklight and verify that it is operational.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the stacklight photo to identify the hospital station stacklight during inspection.

stop_or_escalate_if: The source-supported inspection cannot confirm stacklight operational status.
Corrective action is needed, because the source does not provide repair steps.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The stacklight is operational.
Each hospital station has one stacklight that illuminates in sections to give information about actions at the station.

steps.title: Inspect tabletop cleanliness
steps.purpose: Verify the documented daily preventive maintenance condition for hospital station tabletop cleanliness.
steps.instruction: Inspect the hospital station tabletop and verify that it is free of debris.
steps.expected_result: The tabletop is verified as free of debris.
steps.healthy_condition: The tabletop is free of debris.
steps.failure_condition: Debris is present on the tabletop.

actions.label: Inspect tabletop
actions.exact_action: Inspect the hospital station tabletop and verify that it is free of debris.

stop_or_escalate_if: The tabletop is not free of debris.
Corrective action beyond documenting the issue is needed, because the source does not provide corrective steps.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The tabletop is free of debris.

steps.title: Record inspection results
steps.purpose: Document whether each inspected hospital station meets all documented daily preventive maintenance conditions.
steps.instruction: Record whether each inspected hospital station meets all documented inspection conditions.
steps.expected_result: Inspection results are documented for each hospital station.
steps.healthy_condition: Each station is recorded as meeting all documented conditions when scanner operation, stacklight operation, and tabletop cleanliness are all acceptable.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented conditions are not met and the issue is recorded for follow-up.

actions.label: Document inspection outcome
actions.exact_action: Record whether each inspected hospital station meets all documented inspection conditions.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any hospital station does not meet the documented inspection conditions.
Follow-up corrective action is required, because the source does not provide corrective steps.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The barcode scanner is operational. The stacklight is operational. The tabletop is free of debris.

success_criteria: Each inspected hospital station is confirmed to have an operational barcode scanner.
Each inspected hospital station is confirmed to have an operational stacklight.
Each inspected hospital station is confirmed to have a tabletop free of debris.
Inspection results are recorded for each inspected hospital station.
failure_conditions: Tabletop is not free of debris.
Operational status cannot be confirmed using the source-supported inspection information.
escalation_guidance: If scanner operation, stacklight operation, or tabletop cleanliness does not meet the documented condition, stop at documenting the observed issue.
Escalate for follow-up when corrective action is required, because the source does not provide corrective or repair steps.
Use SME review to define the exact operational test method for scanner and stacklight status, because the source does not specify it.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital station area and scanner context.
Green scanner context at the hospital station.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Inspect each hospital station for the following: The barcode scanner is operational. The stacklight is operational. The tabletop is free of debris.

missing_details: The source does not define how to test or confirm barcode scanner operational status.
The source does not define how to test or confirm stacklight operational status.
The source does not provide corrective actions if any inspection condition fails.
The source does not explicitly assign the procedure to a role; L2_support is a conservative assignment from the candidate.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not state whether production stop or LOTO is required.
